# OneView by Skills for Change
> Outcomes tracking and funder reporting platform for immigrants and refugees in Toronto.

## Purpose

OneView allows Skills for Change staff to capture client data once and automatically generate reports for 4 funders (IRCC, Employment Ontario, United Way, City of Toronto) across 8 programs. It includes AI narrative generation, funder CSV export, privacy compliance, and RBAC.

## Base URL

https://skills-for-change-one-view.vercel.app

## API Endpoints

### GET /api/health
Returns: {status:"ok", db:true, version:"1.0.0"}
Auth: Public

### GET /api/init
Initializes database tables and seeds demo data if empty.
Returns: {initialized:true, seeded:boolean}
Auth: Public

### GET /api/clients
Returns all clients with enrolments and outcome counts.
Returns: {clients:[{id,full_name,primary_language,immigration_stream,program,funder,consent_cross_program,enrolled_at,outcomes_achieved,outcomes_total}], metrics:{total,active,crossProgram,outcomesAchievedPct,byProgram}}
Auth: Caseworker or higher

### POST /api/clients
Create a new client.
Body: {full_name:string, primary_language:string, immigration_stream:string, program:string, funder?:string, consent_cross_program?:boolean}
Returns: {clientId:string, enrolId:string} (201)
Auth: Caseworker or higher

### POST /api/export
Generate a funder-specific CSV.
Body: {funder:"ircc"|"eo"|"uw"|"city"}
Returns: {headers:string[], rows:string[][], funder:string, label:string, count:number}
Auth: Admin

### POST /api/draft-report
Generate AI narrative for a funder report.
Body: {funder:string, period:string, forceLive?:boolean}
Returns: {narrative:string, cached:boolean, metrics:object}
Auth: Admin

### POST /api/query
Ask a question about program metrics.
Body: {question:string}
Returns: {answer:string, metrics:object}
Auth: Caseworker or higher

### POST /api/reset
Truncate all tables and re-seed 16,247 demo clients.
Body: {}
Returns: {success:true, message:string}
Auth: Admin only

### GET /api/provider
Returns current LLM provider.
Returns: {provider:"gemini"|"claude"|"groq"}
Auth: Public

## Authentication

Demo mode: add ?role=admin|caseworker|viewer to any URL.
AI Agent mode: Authorization: Bearer <ONEVIEW_API_KEY> header.
Default role when no param: admin.

## Programs and Funders

settlement -> ircc
language -> ircc
employment -> eo
trades -> eo
mental_health -> uw
youth -> uw
mentoring -> city
women -> city

## Privacy Rules

PHI Wall: mental_health program data is ALWAYS excluded from cross-program queries. This is a PHIPA requirement enforced at SQL level.

Consent: Set consent_cross_program=true in enrolments for cross-program data sharing. Requires verbal client consent.

## Data Model

clients: id(uuid), full_name, primary_language, immigration_stream, created_at
enrolments: id, client_id, program, funder, consent_cross_program(bool), enrolled_at
outcomes: id, enrolment_id, tier(immediate|intermediate|ultimate), label, achieved(bool), recorded_at
audit_log: id, action, entity, detail(jsonb), user_role, source_ip, at
report_cache: id, funder, period, narrative, created_at

## Environment Variables

LLM_PROVIDER: gemini (default), claude, or groq
LLM_API_KEY: API key for the selected LLM provider
POSTGRES_URL: Vercel Postgres connection string
ONEVIEW_API_KEY: Bearer token for AI Agent role

## Reset Demo Data

POST /api/reset truncates all tables and re-seeds 16,247 demo clients across 8 programs.

## Integration Notes

Microsoft Forms: Configure Power Automate HTTP action to POST to /api/clients with mapped fields.
Salesforce: Configure Outbound Message or REST webhook to /api/clients.
iCARE: Generate CSV via POST /api/export with funder="ircc", upload manually.
EOIS-CaMS: Generate CSV via POST /api/export with funder="eo", upload manually.
